raw_consumer_statement: Contacted Citi Bank about disputing lost card on XXXX XX/XX/XXXX about disputing XXXX transactions from XX/XX/XXXX XX/XX/XXXX from XXXX that were not effectuated and therefore considered unknown charges on card and therefore lost to cardholder and should not be responsible.
